fileMap: internal/engine/scorer_test.go — modify — add five new test functions covering unsupported language, unmeasured complexity, regression guard, no defaults injection, and aggregate skip
fixApproach: Investigate the existing scorer.go, scorer_test.go, and related types (Unit, Score, Dimension, language tiers) to understand the current scoring model. Then add five focused tests: (1) unsupported language returns N/A with no dimension scores, (2) zero complexity from TierGeneric is not scored as excellent, (3) supported Go unit still produces real grades as a regression guard, (4) TierGeneric units have no default 0.5 dimensions injected, (5) aggregate logic skips unsupported units. Use the existing test patterns and helper factories from the codebase. Run `go test ./... -count=1` to verify.
openQuestions: What are the exact field names and types of the Unit, Score, and Dimension structs?
Does Score() return a struct with Grade, Unsupported bool, and Dimensions map?
Is there an aggregate function (e.g., AggregateScores or similar) that needs testing?
What is the existing test helper pattern used to construct test units?
steps: Read internal/engine/scorer.go to understand Score(), scoreFromMetrics(), and any aggregate function signatures, return types, and dimension map keys.
Read internal/engine/scorer_test.go to understand existing test patterns, helper factories, and import conventions.
Read internal/engine/language_tiers.go to confirm TierGeneric language identifiers and the Unsupported marker mechanism.
Read the Unit, Score, and Dimension type definitions (likely in internal/engine/types.go or similar).
Add TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA: construct a Unit with Language='Swift', call Score(), assert Grade=='N/A', Unsupported==true, and no dimension scores present.

Add TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored: construct a TierGeneric Unit with Complexity=0, call scoreFromMetrics or Score, assert maintainability dimension is NOT 0.95 (excellent) — it should be absent or unmeasured.

Add TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks: construct a Go Unit with realistic metrics (complexity, coverage, etc.), call Score(), assert grade is one of A/B/C/D/F (not N/A) and dimension scores are populated.
Add TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected: construct a TierGeneric Unit, call Score(), assert no dimension has value 0.5 (the old default); all unmeasured dimensions should be absent.
Add TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported: if an aggregate function exists, call it with a mix including an unsupported unit, assert the unsupported unit is excluded from the result.
Run `go test ./internal/engine/... -count=1` to validate the new tests compile and pass.
Run `go test ./... -count=1` for full project verification.
summary: Add five comprehensive tests to scorer_test.go covering unsupported-language N/A, unmeasured-complexity guard, supported-language regression, no-defaults-injection, and aggregate-unsupported-skip.
